summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of MALIN e-commerce app (frontend-only, no backend). All 19 critical UI/flow tests passed using Playwright against the public preview URL. Covered: home hero, theme toggle, header navigation, shop filters/sort/14 products, product card hover/view/add-to-cart, product detail (gallery, qty, add-to-cart toast), similar products, cart drawer, cart page (inc/dec/remove/clear), localStorage persistence across reload, mock checkout flow with confirmation + cart clear, empty-cart redirect, newsletter form input clearing, and mobile menu at 390px.

issues: Mobile menu animation appears to bleed through the underlying hero text briefly during opacity fade-in. The bg-background is correct but the fade animation creates a momentary transparent state where the hero 'Smart Everyday.' text shows through the menu nav items. Consider snapping background to fully opaque immediately or using slide-in transform instead of opacity for the overlay.

action_items: (Optional) Tighten mobile menu overlay: replace opacity fade with instant opaque background (or slide-in) to avoid the brief visual bleed-through of the underlying hero during animation.
critical_code_review_comments: Test ID naming for cart controls uses suffix with product id (cart-increment-{id}, cart-decrement-{id}, cart-page-inc-{id}, cart-page-dec-{id}, cart-page-remove-{id}) — review_request listed them without suffix; current implementation is more robust but worth documenting in any test handoff.

Cart page summary subtotal uses data-testid='summary-subtotal' (not 'cart-subtotal' as some test plans expect). 'cart-subtotal' is used only inside the cart drawer. Naming inconsistency is minor but worth aligning.

Product page reuses the same images list twice ('product.images.concat(product.images).slice(0, 4)') to fill 4 thumbnails; if some products legitimately have 4 distinct images this could hide them. Acceptable for current static data (all products have 2-3 images).
CartContext writes to localStorage on every items change with open:false hardcoded — drawer-open state never persists across reload (intentional and reasonable).
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes — excellent testability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend MVP is complete and fully functional. Backend is intentionally not yet implemented (Stripe + product catalogue all mocked / static). When backend phase starts, add real /api product endpoints and real Stripe integration on /checkout; existing data-testids on Checkout (stripe-placeholder, checkout-submit, checkout-confirmation) should remain stable. Cart persistence key is 'malin.cart.v1' in localStorage. Theme key is 'malin.theme'.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All 19 acceptance-criteria flows from the review request executed successfully end-to-end on the public preview URL.
